protocol_notes: Compared QSC and Arctic peptides to genuine MJ (Mounjaro) 10mg pen from CVS and Walgreens. Used QSC and Arctic for several weeks prior, original MJ pens from Walgreens starting in April 2023. Noted that GLP-1 medications cause variable body chemistry changes including blood sugar reduction, increased insulin production, reduced liver enzymes, and variable dose-to-dose reactions during titration. Received COA from Arctic for two batches from different shipments.
